titleStmt.title: SII 41.253: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 253. (A.R. No. 471 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

p.hi: Vijayanagara Mallikarjunaraya, son of Devaraya-Maharaya, Saka 1372, Sukla = 1449 A.D.

summary.p: A similar gift, as in the above inscription, for a lamp by the same Sādam officers, for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmanmahā maṇṭalecura Ariyārayavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan
muvarāyar kaṇṭan tevarāya mahāirāyar kumārar mallikāṟcuṉa Irāyaṟku cellāniṉṟa cakāp
ttam 1000 3 100 7 10 2 l mel cellā niṉṟa cukkila varuṣam Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅ
kāṭuṭaiya nāyanārkku tirununtāviḷakkukku mallikāṟcunarāyaṟku tan
mmāka cātamāṇikka nāyanārum Attanātarum Aḻakiyanāyanārum tanmamāka ti
ruviḷakku maṉṟāṭi tevakkon cūriyakkoṉ Ivarkaḷai Appar cannatiyile nāḷ
toṟum Oru tirununtāviḷakkum niṟceyippu neyyum paṇamum tāṉattār yiṭṭa taravinpaṭi
yiṟuttuvarkaḷākavum Inta kuṭikaḷukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkaikarai
yil kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku tanma cātaṉam paṇṇi kuṭu
ttom Ivai māṇikka nāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Atti(ti)nātaṉ Eḻuttu Aḻakiyanāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
